steps: Warm DMEM full media, PBS, and Trypsin in the 37 °C bead bath for 00:30:00 . Clean the working area by using 70% ethanol.
Sup out old media without touching cells.
Wash by adding 5 mL PBS slowly, rinse, and rock back and forth.
Add 2 mL - 3 mL trypsin (0.25%); keep in incubator for 00:03:00 .
Check under microscope if cells are detached, add 5 mL media and transfer to a tube.
Sup out and add 10 mL fresh media & re-suspend cells gently and carefully.
Count cells density and split accordingly. 15,000 cells/ml for maintenance. (i) Usually 1.0-1.5 x10^4/ml cells for Biochem, and (ii) 0.5 x10^4/ml cells for IF.
Replace with DMEM full media/Drug treat.
creator: Jane Balster
